name: gs-dev
description: Advanced dev workflow — /sprint-plan (+ ADRs) /sprint-tickets /sprint-build /sprint-review /sprint-refine (+ spec). Ported from the Claude Code gs-dev plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Five-phase sprint workflow with parallel specialist review.
interface.longDescription: Plan a cycle, break it into GitHub Issues, build in parallel waves, review with a panel of specialist subagents, and close the cycle out. Uses the gh CLI.
